title: Degraded End Portals
description: A mod which makes the End Portals degraded (or broken), which makes them unusable
body:
# Degraded End Portals [Github](https://github.com/LevAlTru/degraded-end-portals) | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/degraded-end-portals) ## Functionality Makes strongholds generate degraded portals. Degraded portals are unusable, which makes them unusable as a portal to The End
WARNING:
**There is a small chance where the portal can be still usable.**
The chance is `0.7^12` or `~1.4%`. The chance for a world to have a usable end portal is `(1-(1-~0.014)^128)` or `~83.2%` ## Compatibility Works with [YUNG's Better Strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds) ## Q&A
Will it be available for other modloaders and versions? I am lazy to port for the other modloaders, and i do promise that i'll port this mod to newer version.

In short: do not expect any updates.
## Gallery Portal in [YUNG's Better Strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-strongholds):
![yungs-better-stronghold-portal](https://cdn.bsky.app/img/feed_thumbnail/plain/did:plc:kjyty26tl25aixu3cedyyyuk/bafkreiewuf6fzkp7e54nf3gmbzj7fhjke2jhmpvh6hjvenusdp4dox6ewm@jpeg) Icon:
![degraded_end_portals_icon-export](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iKJbeCDu/images/9c0b211872f0d4edb4bf6c473e2fa863560d0073.png)
